title: Numbered hotbar (theo edition)
description: Numbered hotbar but its theobaldthebirds keybinds!
body:
#  Welcome to Numbered hotbar (theo edition) 

this pack is meant to help people that watched theobaldthebirds video on the ultimate guide to keybinds which i watched, i felt it was pretty hard to remember these keybinds especially for someone who used to use the scrollwheel. so i made this pack to help me get better at all forms of PVP.
### 
###  Credits!
[Original numbered hotbar](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/numbered-hotbar)

[pixel art for the cover](https://www.reddit.com/r/cockatiel/comments/msito7/pixel_art_of_my_bird_kiki/)


[theos keybinds video ](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=471bVlFOpwY)


###  Q/A
**what version does this work on?**

_should work on any version but if it doesnt msg me on discord i accept all message requests (F0_olish on discord_

**how do i use the pack ?**

_simply go to options, Resource packs and the drag and drop the pack right in there!_


**im having a special issue with the pack :(**

_msg me on discord (F0_olish)_
